shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "Next.js Pages Router to App Router migration route handlers _app _document getServerSideProps types" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "for f in package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts pages/index.js pages/blog/index.js 'pages/blog/[id].js' pages/api/posts/index.js 'pages/api/posts/[id].js' pages/_app.js pages/_document.js pages/_error.js pages/404.js components/AppProvider.js styles/globals.css; do printf '\\n--- %s ---\\n' \""'$f"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$f"; done'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"from ['\\\"]next/(router|head|document)|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|pages/|pages\\\\/\" --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!.next/**'"' . || true; printf '\\nApp files:\\n'; rg --files app components lib | sort; printf '\\nPages dir:\\n'; find pages -print 2>/dev/null || true; git diff --stat 2>/dev/null || true"

/bin/bash -lc "rmdir pages/api/posts pages/api pages/blog pages && printf '%s\\n' '--- tsconfig ---' && sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json && printf '%s\\n' '--- remaining legacy APIs ---' && rg -n \"next/(router|head|document)|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|pages/\" --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!.next/**'"' . || true && printf '%s\\n' '--- pages exists? ---' && test "'! -e pages && echo removed && printf '"'%s\\n' '--- source files ---' && rg --files app components lib | sort"

/bin/bash -lc "rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && rg -n \"next/(router|head|document)|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|pages/\" --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!.next/**'"' --glob '"'!package-lock.json'"' --glob '"'!tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'"' . || true && test "'! -e pages && echo '"'pages directory removed' && mkdir -p \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/next-app-router-migration.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Next.js App Router migration patterns

Pages Router data functions map to async App Router page components, typed metadata, "'`generateStaticParams`, segment `revalidate`, and `notFound()`. API handlers use Web `Request` plus `NextResponse`, while client navigation hooks such as `useRouter` belong in isolated client components.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
